description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On March 20, 2025 at 7:17 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Mountain View, California was in a 
collision involving a bus on N. Rengstorff Avenue near E. Charleston Road.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling north on N Rengstorff Avenue and came to a stop in a queue of traffic. While the Waymo AV remained 
stationary, a bus traveling directly behind the Waymo AV attempted to maneuver around the stopped Waymo AV by crossing the double 
yellow center line, entering the opposing lane of travel. As the bus proceeded alongside the stationary Waymo AV, the passenger side of the 
bus made contact with the rear driver side of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in 
autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
